title: The Magdalene Protocol
author: Magdalene, Monika Maria
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The Magdalene Protocol: The AI Economy  
 This white paper explores the intersection of High-Frequency Psychology™ and the emerging AI Economy, framing the current technological shift not merely as a tool for efficiency but as a catalyst for human expansion. Utilizing the  Magdalene Protocol —a three-pillar framework consisting of  The Frequency Audit  (Diagnostic),  Bio-Resonance Calibration  (Alignment), and  Sovereign Integration  (Expansion)—this work examines how executives can leverage AI research and cognitive sophistication to navigate the frequency data sets of legacy structures. This paper provides a roadmap for leaders to maintain a high-frequency mindset within a rapidly automated landscape.
